label: China / Mandarin
ladderNote: Mainland Mandarin from Chinese media and forums (知乎, 36氪, 腾讯). Classic path is 暧昧 → 确定关系 / 男女朋友. Younger speakers also use situationship as a loanword.

levels.meaning: Texting / following each other; early contact stage.
Ambiguous romantic gray zone — more than friends, not yet official. Core Chinese dating term.
Hookup / one-night stand. Casual sex without a relationship frame.
Friends with benefits / regular sex partner. Widely used on 知乎 and Chinese media.
Undefined ongoing intimacy. English loan used in Chinese youth media (36氪 etc.), often "炮友以上、恋人未满".

levels.term: 确定关系 / 在一起了
levels.meaning: Made it official — the explicit "what are we" step into a relationship.

levels.term: 男女朋友 / 谈恋爱 / 搞对象
levels.meaning: Boyfriend/girlfriend; dating. 搞对象 is colloquial mainland speech for being in a relationship.
My partner / significant other; everyday couple language.
